textByHash.07425719867aca6a08d699bd17ec1207f05e33e8: If you had enough space in your inventory I'd give you some air runes, come back when you do.
textByHash.086970b71142436e13f904f5abb14908afa3594a: Certainly! Runes will go straight to your rune pouch when you pick them up, if it contains matching runes.
textByHash.0fcaa7f8e86b43157361476945bc6be2ed888ba1: There are a couple of things you will need to make runes, rune essence and a talisman to enter the temple ruins.
textByHash.105532f8ca5e173b9b299e5484442cf02d1c94e6: This is your spell book, this contains all the spells you can cast. To cast a spell, you will need to have the required magic level and have the right amount of the runes used to cast the spell.
textByHash.13103c9328d423a4d169b1483f40b268c9e4ac82: I see you already have access to the ancient magicks. Well done, these will aid you greatly.
textByHash.13da2b1f9c00fdc0bdb9de39149be972de6e10df: Nemarti, the Ranged Combat tutor and I both give out items every 30 minutes, however you must choose whether you want runes or ranged equipment.
textByHash.183fcca714f4d5f4c7364ef77a3aea02a82a2524: You'll no longer receive a starter pack after respawn. Talk to me again if you change your mind.
textByHash.19321c2c42e4e450655c67354bff19a49b68a850: You'll need some Rune Essence with you before you go looking. When you find the ruined altar, use the talisman on it to be transported to a temple where you can craft your runes.
textByHash.1dca3753353e5b891f1bf7da40d9c2ab2b96fddf: Nemarti, the Ranged Combat tutor and I both give out items every 30 minutes, however you must choose whether you want runes or ranged equipment. To claim runes, right-click on me and choose Claim, to claim
textByHash.1de1cc1d2159122998c5bdfaa6d34bdca8cfdd36: You can't even cast Wind Strike?
textByHash.2537ede9caa6867da5c4caba05f219a544ab04cc: Alternatively, you can let them go into your inventory like normal.
textByHash.2775eccf42336e3d4b79a9ba7bc2aa56346830be: When you have your talisman, right-click on it and select the Locate option. It will point you in the direction of the ruined altar.
textByHash.2bca533bac56b3aeda06bb80a347cb375f2276ca: If you had enough space in your inventory I'd give you some mind runes, come back when you do.
textByHash.3cb012f06245cf65d171ea40d43de2a2d9eca72e: I work with the Ranged Combat tutor to give out consumable items that you may need for combat such as arrows and runes. However we have had some cheeky people try to take both!
textByHash.424b0a8dbb116303df81b748cbbb9ebf9c21c409: To make one, take a tiara and talisman to the ruins and use the tiara on the temple altar. This will bind the talisman to your tiara.
textByHash.468bcca57d68e9587ed5259b43455e527b64014e: When you pick up runes from the ground, if you're carrying a rune pouch that contains matching runes, I can make the runes you've picked up go straight into the pouch, provided there's space.
textByHash.47cd244e02bc839cc5a1f02b67b94b0f1035f77c: You will need a talisman for the rune you would like to create. You can right-click on it and select the Locate option. This will tell you the rough location of the altar.
textByHash.4c0dbb0af8e23ee19fe142b614ecd76f7c02ca38: If you have the right amount of runes and the magic level the spell will light up, meaning you will be able to cast it.
textByHash.4e34828184763c4a62aa6828410373e340355617: Mind talismans can occasionally be found on imps, if you can kill such a fast-moving creature.
textByHash.4f76b86e008c0361440319cb558fc10e26a58679: I see you have some experience already in Runecrafting. Perhaps you should try crafting some runes which you can then use in magic.
textByHash.506e10c8ede8849c1e2520f23eb52fdb6a412679: You already have some mind runes.
textByHash.592691b4a09105b6bfb63f7ec78bb62640f391b0: To get rune essence you will need to gather them somehow. You should talk to the Duke of Lumbridge, he may be able to help you with that. Alternatively, other players may sell you the essence.
textByHash.6527245afa1be8435a90dadcd9f49d8d4d5419f2: If you want a challenge, Kolodion, the master of battle magic, has set up an arena deep in the Wilderness. There you will have the chance to learn some extremely powerful spells.
textByHash.67ec35a57948976cd047bbc8d0dda677d8ff825e: I see that you've already found out about the Rune Essence mines from my friend Aubury in Varrock. So you need to turn that essence into runes, eh?
textByHash.6f7d86e4c6a3f596e5460cc0b1ec2418b273ad60: Yes, I can help with that.
textByHash.73109a69f1bcd1ae6c42be0b584ebda14319e351: So, every half an hour, you may come back and claim either arrows OR runes, but not both. Come back in a while for runes, or simply make your own.
textByHash.74826de662b840a3ef7e16d21aa32161f6fadc03: Check the skill guide to see which runes you can craft.
textByHash.784046d94302a79fadf2465d50dc114cb544036f: Superheat Item and the Alchemy spells are good ways to level magic if you are not interested in the combat aspect of magic.
textByHash.82e357c572f53c1a9e9e76919685210e24eb007b: Try rats in the castle or, if you're feeling brave, the goblins to the west have been causing a nuisance of themselves.
textByHash.84650a9d42869c46b5d8da7a373f601bfca65239: To get rune essence you will need to gather them in the essence mine. You can get to the mine by talking to Aubury who owns the runes shop in south east Varrock.
textByHash.84c7808bd6ca016e799ea68ddaecf258b9e5a067: Certainly! Runes will go to your inventory when you pick them up, rather than going into a rune pouch.
textByHash.852955a468d936e5dcfecdc9d6ca9c8ec7523d5d: Clicking on the temple's altar will imbue your rune essence with the altar's magical property.
textByHash.8f1162b6756e17e79cbbbebe0daed2de382e2456: If you want to save yourself an inventory space, you could always try binding the talisman to a tiara.
textByHash.92592e50f2d50748e08749c89a7e799819443e4b: You have some mind runes in your bank.
textByHash.95a446e9e46949e3e3643bcf83638312633b7ad5: Is there anything else I can do for you?
textByHash.96d6f57a788fbaa3e7c594b333fff9319baad93f: How about you? Do you want any help?
textByHash.974c78a511bea0e08e7fb1ed34abc98f214a170f: You already have some air runes.
textByHash.9fb79f4c0f34fdbde9e35567abd655baa0859ed0: You should investigate the treasure in the desert, you may find great benefit to your magic.
textByHash.a070c2317c14b56010a5ab1f130c5540602eb254: Here you go. One starter pack. Enjoy.
textByHash.a0fc9b41fed005f6f7f8995e3f75f357ad91888e: You can cast different spells according to what runes you have in your inventory. To begin, you'll need mind runes and air runes. These will allow you to cast Wind Strike like you did in the tutorial.
textByHash.a36a8b4d962d86aaf62aa35fa0b4e6ccdcb17440: Speak to the Archaeologist in the Bedabin Camp, south- west of the Shantay Pass. But be careful, this quest is not for the faint of heart and can be very dangerous.
textByHash.a9b38fb0ecac64e99e74cc65fea442180c942abd: I see you have already met Kolodion, you should keep practicing those spells. Maybe you will be able to use them outside the arena after practicing them enough times.
textByHash.ac8972133ab6157c26b37c4ffd3c0e88d9b8d533: Check the spellbook side-panel to see which spells you can cast. If you have the correct runes for a spell, it will light up.
textByHash.b18b622e0cff6aadc2cbc43d0618abd8d4e1e5d4: Hello there adventurer, I am the Magic combat tutor. Would you like to learn about magic combat, or perhaps how to make runes?
textByHash.b98f40ea506bff200dded52ac744a1df162f03d3: To check the level and runes required to cast a spell, hover your mouse cursor over the spell.
textByHash.b99e1a952d6efdaacfa160b6fa9318f965e04030: Why certainly! You already know a little about creating runes I see.
textByHash.bd9b42f615cfaebc7e2de3d77a5a1c66539d3b95: There's always the Magic Training Arena. You can find it north of the Emir's Arena, north-east of Al Kharid. You will be able to earn some special rewards there by practicing your magic there.
textByHash.bf1ca1d74ae0883a5c787292e1ce75a8f5696ac6: Wearing metal armour and ranged armour can seriously impair your magical abilities. Make sure you wear some robes to maximise your capabilities.
textByHash.c02e2ca34e73c8e2d822a7ca29eab9e1e7049d8d: You'll need a mind or air talisman before you can begin. This will enable you to find and use the ruins of the altars.
textByHash.c3b210340eb0a86190e80cf0c709b8caabe3d607: You have some air runes in your bank.
textByHash.c61cc91c2cbb79c33283a6c0d1b2f5eeb6166ea9: As you're fairly new to runecrafting you should start with air runes and mind runes.
textByHash.ccff0606044b26d4909a84f8adb922612af9a03a: Well, if you have some air runes and mind runes you can cast Wind Strike...
textByHash.d221bd5a56da134cc2c5578bab1c240447ef6947: Of course ! As a rule of thumb, if you cast the highest spell of which you're capable, you'll get the best experience possible.
textByHash.d6f4d55ff6ea751c69cecac83d8ee93b21a6a3da: ranged equipment right-click on the Ranged Combat tutor and select Claim.
textByHash.dc4aef8ee51554048a8e88e82305328d7fa440b2: I heard that goblins occasionally drop air talismans when they die - they must be stealing them from somewhere!
textByHash.e2543b2e52f4700443a34285a120078ce1d59a76: To claim runes, right-click on me and choose Claim, to claim ranged equipment right-click on the Ranged Combat tutor and select Claim.
textByHash.e665e1711eac957dd4f8a82cfcfa7531aac9d262: Greetings Zanik! You look like someone who might know something about spells!
textByHash.e76034b96173b4610ef0e03a0a832f09497cadc5: When you have a combat spell available, click on it once, then select your target. A good target would be a monster that is below your combat level.
textByHash.ebca59307f84f16c0e6ca54b5736cb48a00672e7: If you need some more advice, you should talk to Adventurer Jon about Adventure paths. He may even have a handy starter kit you can use.
textByHash.eeb5e835cde800dea3f0fc8b3319b398373962bb: When you find the ruined altar, use the talisman on it to be transported to a temple where you can craft your runes.
textByHash.f7825bc280cfc4da41b81005709c51930aabd952: Is there anything else you would like to know?
textByHash.fe30cf9c4ffef1c5a927185ae5e653f902745185: Well, if you don't know the basics at all it'll take a long time to teach you...
